Precompile ABI: verify(bytes proof, bytes vk, bytes32[] publicInputs)         Selector: bytes4(keccak256(\"verify(bytes,bytes,bytes32[])\"))"},"test_fixturesLoaded()":{"notice":"Verify that fixtures loaded correctly and have expected sizes"},"test_gasReport_submitProof_age()":{"notice":"Measure gas for submitProof with real age proof size"},"test_gasReport_submitProof_membership()":{"notice":"Measure gas for submitProof with real membership proof size"},"test_submitProof_invalidProof_realRejection()":{"notice":"Test that invalid/random proof bytes are handled correctly"},"test_submitProof_realFixtures_age()":{"notice":"Test with real age proof fixtures"},"test_submitProof_realFixtures_membership()":{"notice":"Test the full submit flow with real membership proof fixtures.         Uses mocked precompile for local testing.         On Sincerin devnet, the precompile would verify the real proof."}},"notice":"Integration tests for Coordinator \u2194 VerifyUltraHonk precompile.     These tests load REAL ZK proof fixtures and validate the full     request \u2192 assign \u2192 submit \u2192 verify flow.     ENCODING FINDINGS (Sprint 2, Task 6.5):       The current Coordinator.submitProof() sends to VerifyUltraHonk:         verifyPrecompile.staticcall(abi.encode(proof, vkHash, publicInputs))       This has THREE encoding incompatibilities:         1. Missing 4-byte function selector \u2014 the precompile routes by selector         2. Sends bytes32 vkHash \u2014 precompile expects bytes vk (full VK)         3. Sends bytes publicInputs \u2014 precompile expects bytes32[] publicInputs       Fix required in Coordinator.sol:         - Store full VK bytes (not just hash) or pass VK from caller         - Convert publicInputs to bytes32[]         - Use abi.encodeWithSelector(0x<verify_selector>, proof, vk, pubInputs)     TEST MODES:       Local (default):  Uses vm.mockCall to simulate precompile responses.                          Validates contract logic, gas usage, and fixture loading.       Devnet:           Run with --fork-url pointing to a Sincerin L1 node.                          Precompile calls execute natively (no mocks needed).","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"test/integration/CoordinatorIntegration.t.sol":"CoordinatorIntegration"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":10000},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"]},"sources":{"lib/forge-std/src/Base.sol":{"keccak256":"0x926f1c9907b7dadb56dc920ae80dc473070989ab1f09b63e207ddc2d37110faa","license":"MIT test_correctPrecompileEncoding_membershi.notice: Validate the encoding format that Coordinator uses for VerifyUltraHonk.         Precompile ABI: verify(bytes proof, bytes vk, bytes32[] publicInputs)         Selector: bytes4(keccak256("verify(bytes,bytes,bytes32[])"))
